description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that builds and publishes Python packages to PyPI. The workflow triggers on push to any branch except pre-commit-ci* and on pull requests, and also on tags. It runs on an ubuntu-20.04 environment, setting up Python 3.8, installing build packages, building releases, verifying wheels, and uploading artifacts. Additionally, it publishes to PyPI if the workflow is triggered by a tag, using credentials from secrets.
